response.justification: While the candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and exceptional software craftsmanship practices (TDD, testing, distributed systems thinking), there is a critical skill gap in the primary requirement: modern C++ development. With only ~6 months of C++ experience from a decade ago and primary expertise in JavaScript/web technologies, the candidate would require substantial ramp-up time in systems programming for a senior-level IC role where C++ is the primary language.
strengths: Direct geospatial and mapping domain expertise through GIS platforms and Northwind Labs (event-driven geo-data platform used by Green Map)
Exceptional emphasis on software quality and testing practices with TDD background and fluent-asserts testing library creation
Demonstrated ability to learn new programming languages and master different technical stacks (C#, Swift, DLang, Java) across domains
concerns: Only ~6 months of commercial C++ experience from 10 years ago; role requires modern C++ as primary language for active development
Last decade of professional work focused on JavaScript/TypeScript/Node.js/Ember.js web technologies, not systems-level programming
No Rust experience and limited evidence of low-level systems optimization, OS concepts, or high-performance data pipeline work

key_factors.factor: Software engineering discipline and language learning agility
